features.featureTitle: Save the uploaded HOPE logo (HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-1.png — circular design with two cupped hands and 'Helping Outstanding Pupils in Education' text) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hope-logo.png and replace every existing HOPE logo image reference in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx with this new file, preserving the original size and position in each location.

Save the uploaded CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust logo (CETA Logo-Photoroom-1.png — circular design with globe, ribbon, and 'CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust' text) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/ceta-logo.png and replace every existing CETA logo image reference in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx with this new file, preserving the original size and position in each location.
